description: Single source of truth for the audit_events actor_source taxonomy (Phase C3). The native enum LariatNative/Sources/LariatModel/ActorSource.swift and the web reconciler constant scripts/phase-c-reconcile.mjs::CANONICAL_ACTOR_SOURCES must both equal this set exactly. Enforced by tests/js/test-actor-source-parity.mjs (web) and LariatNative/Tests/LariatModelTests/ActorSourceTests.swift (native). Historical rows are never rewritten; this governs new writes. To add a value: update this file + both code sites together.
